title: Add weekly Markdown brief export
description: Generate a creator-facing weekly brief with themes, representative comments, and traceable source references.
close_reason: Markdown brief export implemented as part of the MVP in ee9c1fd. The exporter.py module generates a weekly brief with themes, evidence links, content ideas, and category summary table.

title: Implement CSV comment import MVP
description: Parse a CSV comment export, store comments in SQLite, and preserve source IDs for evidence links.
close_reason: MVP implemented in ee9c1fd. CSV import, SQLite storage, TF-IDF clustering, Markdown brief export, Flask web UI. Smoke tested with 20 sample comments → 5 themes → weekly-brief.md.
